products_crm.title: CRM OMUZ
products_crm.subtitle: Education Center Management System
products_crm.description: Consolidate all your education center operations — from enrollment to attendance tracking and payments — in one system. CRM OMUZ makes every day easier.
products_crm.features_title: Everything You Need in One Place
products_crm.features_subtitle: Professional tools designed specifically for education centers.

analytics.title: Advanced Analytics
analytics.desc: Real-time statistics on enrollment, attendance, and revenue.

scheduling.title: Smart Scheduling
scheduling.desc: Automated class scheduling and classroom management.

payments.title: Progress Tracking
payments.desc: Track every student's progress and generate reports.

students.title: Student Portal
students.desc: Students and parents can view grades and attendance.

mobile.title: Mobile App
mobile.desc: Manage your business from your phone — for iOS and Android.

support.title: 24/7 Support
support.desc: Our team is ready around the clock to help you.

faq.a1: Yes, CRM OMUZ is fully cloud-based. You can access it from anywhere.
faq.a2: Absolutely. We help you import all your data for free.
faq.a3: Yes, we provide comprehensive training for your entire team.

products_crm.integrations_subtitle: Connect CRM with the tools you already use.

workflow.step1_desc: Upload an Excel file with students, teachers, and schedules.
workflow.step2_desc: Set up branches, classrooms, and pricing in a few clicks.
workflow.step3_desc: Send invitations to your team and students to download the app.

0.q: How does CRM help my center?
0.a: Our system automates accounting, scheduling, and student tracking so teachers can focus on teaching.

1.a: Yes, we use international-grade encryption technology.

2.a: Absolutely! The system works on all devices — phones, tablets, and computers.

3.a: Yes, our team is available 24/7 in Tajik, Russian, and English.

4.q: How fast can we get started?
4.a: Setup usually takes less than a day. You can start immediately.

5.a: We offer a comprehensive demo of all features.

testimonials.subtitle: Real experience of using CRM OMUZ from education center leaders.
testimonials.jamshed: Excellent solution for an education center. We saw real growth in student numbers and transparency in management. Highly recommend!
testimonials.malika: After implementing CRM OMUZ, all our processes became organized. The intuitive interface and fast system performance significantly increased our team's efficiency.
testimonials.davron: As a developer, I'm impressed by OMUZ's technical quality. High performance, modern technology, and flawless optimization — this is truly a high-level product.
testimonials.saidumron: Using the platform allowed us to streamline all educational processes. The intuitive interface and fast system significantly increased the efficiency of our team.
testimonials.hasanjon: The CRM program greatly facilitates our work. All data is now in one place, making it easier to track tasks, students, and payments. The workflow has become more organized and efficient.

about_section.title: Why SoftClub CRM?
about_section.subtitle: Not a generic CRM — built from day one for education centers. 13 modules, 7 access roles, multi-branch management — all in one place.
about_section.desc_1: SoftClub CRM replaces scattered spreadsheets, messengers, and paper records with a single unified platform.
about_section.desc_1_sub: Students, teachers, finances, attendance, SMS campaigns & scheduling — manage everything from one dashboard.
about_section.desc_2_sub: Gamification, job board, and advanced analytics take your center to the next level.

features_section.title: 13 Modules — One Platform
features_section.subtitle: Each module solves real operational challenges that education centers face daily.

mentors.title: Analytics & Dashboard
mentors.desc: KPIs, attendance, enrollment, debts and student progress — all on one screen with interactive charts.

schedule.title: Smart Calendar & Scheduling
schedule.desc: Full calendar with day, week & month views. Drag & drop to assign classes. Filter by branch.

career.title: Finance & Accounting
career.desc: Payments, debts, expenses, budgets & teacher salaries — complete financial management in one place.

community.title: SMS Campaigns & Leads
community.desc: SMS templates, bulk messaging, Instagram lead capture & conversion tracking — all built into the CRM.
